nodes.context: Hong Kong-based triad group, second largest in the world, active internationally in drug trafficking and other crimes.

edges.evidence_quote: They are the main rival of the Sun Yee On , which is the largest triad.
edges.context: 14K and Sun Yee On are rivals, with 14K being the second largest triad.

edges.evidence_quote: Under Wan Kuok-koi (nicknamed "Broken Tooth Koi", 崩牙駒 ), the 14K was being challenged by the smaller Shui Fong Triad.
edges.context: Shui Fong Triad challenged 14K in Macau in 1997.

edges.evidence_quote: The 14K triad has been involved in smuggling arms to Abu Sayyaf and has reportedly cooperated with the Islamic group in laundering and transmitting ransom money, taking a percentage of the ransoms in exchange for their assistance.
edges.context: 14K cooperates with Abu Sayyaf in arms smuggling and money laundering.

edges.evidence_quote: The reported criminal activities of the triads included the trafficking of women and children from China into Ireland, involvement in casinos, and money laundering. Gardaí also reported a great deal of interaction between the Chinese gangs operating in Ireland and Scotland.
edges.context: 14K and Wo Shing Wo are rivals in Ireland and UK, involved in turf wars.

edges.evidence_quote: The Sam Gor syndicate is composed of 14K and other Triads and has Canadian roots in and leadership from the Big Circle Boys.
edges.context: 14K is a component of the Sam Gor syndicate.

edges.evidence_quote: Intelligence reports from the Attorney General of Mexico and the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency have indicated that the 14K triad is among the suppliers of raw materials used in the manufacturing of methamphetamine to the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.context: 14K supplies raw materials for methamphetamine to the Sinaloa Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: The 14K has had connections to the leadership of the Ping On triad in Boston and Wah Ching in San Francisco.
edges.context: 14K has connections to Ping On leadership.

edges.evidence_quote: The 14K has had connections to the leadership of the Ping On triad in Boston and Wah Ching in San Francisco.

They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine , a chemical precursor in the illicit manufacture of methamphetamine, from Hong Kong and mainland China, which they sell to local drug trafficking gangs, the Head Hunters and the Hells Angels .

They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine , a chemical precursor in the illicit manufacture of methamphetamine, from Hong Kong and mainland China, which they sell to local drug trafficking gangs, the Head Hunters and the Hells Angels .
Their rivals were Wo Shing Wo, Lo San, Big Circle and Sun Yee On.
edges.context: Lo San is a rival of 14K in Australia.

edges.evidence_quote: Their rivals were Wo Shing Wo, Lo San, Big Circle and Sun Yee On.
edges.context: Big Circle Gang is a rival of 14K in Australia.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ah Kong , Big Circle Gang , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok , Wo Shing Wo
edges.context: Ah Kong is listed as a rival of 14K in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ah Kong , Big Circle Gang , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok , Wo Shing Wo
edges.context: Wo On Lok is listed as a rival of 14K in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ping On , Snakeheads , Wah Ching , Tiny Rascal Gang
edges.context: Snakeheads are listed as allies of 14K in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ping On , Snakeheads , Wah Ching , Tiny Rascal Gang
edges.context: Tiny Rascal Gang is listed as an ally of 14K in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Two 14K groups, 14K-Hau and 14K-Ngai, are among seven Chinese criminal organizations operating in South Africa
edges.context: 14K-Hau is a subgroup of 14K operating in South Africa.

edges.evidence_quote: Two 14K groups, 14K-Hau and 14K-Ngai, are among seven Chinese criminal organizations operating in South Africa
edges.context: 14K-Ngai is a subgroup of 14K operating in South Africa.
